# Type A Reference Layout — Bento 2

Reference example for a simple two-compartment Type A layout.

## Box

- External dimensions: 100 x 200 x 100 mm
- Material thickness: 3 mm
- Kerf: 0.1 mm

## Internal layout

- One traversing primary vertical separator
- Result: two long compartments side by side

## Generated files

- box50-100x200x100-typeA-bento-2-layout.svg
- box50-100x200x100-typeA-bento-2-cut.svg

## Source layout

- generator/layouts/bento-2-100x200x100.json
